sigWerErrors.reason: 'two thousand twenty five' is the standard way to say the year 2025; 'twenty twenty five' is also commonly used and understood to mean the same year. The meaning is preserved.
Omitting 'thousand' in the year 'two thousand twenty five' to say 'twenty twenty five' is a common alternative phrasing for the year 2025. The meaning is unchanged.
